sys_script_client.description:
Reopen completed or cancelled tasks; show a widget or UI Page modal to prompt the User when the task has subtasks, otherwise no modal just reopen single task
v2.7 2.7.0 | 2021-08-29 | mmcc | STRY0107404 - Draft Scheduled Tasks – UI – Delete Modal 2.7.0 | 2021-09-14 | mmcc | STRY0099532 - DIA- 'Mass Reopen' Task Tree Modal (MVP)
v2.5.13 - Check if parent is closed - prompt user if can't reopen - Check if any subtasks are closed incomplete - prompt user if subtasks are closed incomplete and prompt to determine if user would like to reopen - reopen tasks and subtasks if confirmed
sys_script_client.messages: Tasker - Title - Reopen Selection Tasker - Reopen Parent is not active - start Tasker - Reopen Parent is not active - end Tasker - Closed too long to reopen 1 Tasker - Closed too long to reopen 2 Tasker - Closed too long to reopen 3
sys_script_client.name: Task - onSubmit - Reopen
